title: DermaPharm
description: dermapharm.dk DermaPharm A/S is a 100% Danish-owned skincare company founded in 1980, specializing in mild, eco-certified, and allergy-friendly personal care products. Headquartered in Fårup, Denmark, they operate a 10,000 m production facility and serve as both a brand owner (Derma) and a full-service private label manufacturer for third parties The company is a market leader in Nordic suncare and a trusted partner of the Danish Cancer Society
